positive: An ethereal, stylized illustration of a cosmic forest biome. The central focus is a giant, bioluminescent mushroom cluster with delicate root systems trailing into glowing abstract tendrils. Surrounding the mushrooms are stylized, crystalline foliage and whimsical, geometric fauna (such as gentle star-moths and floating flora). Use a deep color palette contrasting neon magenta, cyan, and emerald green against a dark indigo, void-like background. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and contemporary vector illustration, creating strong, graphic silhouettes and clean lines. The composition must be symmetrical and centered, making it ideal for a high-contrast t-shirt graphic. Cinematic lighting, deep depth of field, highly detailed, flat graphic rendering.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grainy, amateur drawing, logo, signature, cartoonish, photorealistic, 3d render
